title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
